content.full_text:
February 23, 1977

Terry Andrus  
Deputy County Counsel  
Orange County  
P.O. Box 1379  
Santa Ana, CA 92702

Dear Mr. Andrus:

This letter is to confirm our telephone conversation today at which time I advised you that the jurisdiction for a superior court judge reporting investments and interests in real property was the State of California. In addition, I indicated that a pension received from a local government agency was not reportable income.

Sincerely,

Ted Prim  
Staff Counsel  
Legal Division

TP:jo
